name: Glass of Antimony
description: A translucent, ruby-colored glass formed by the intense calcination of Antimony with the aid of Vitriol. The foundation of the Digbyan medical corpus.

name: Spirit of Vitriol
description: A sharp, acidic vapor distilled from calcined salts. Essential for the purification of lead.

name: Philosopher's Lead
description: Lead purified by the spirit of vitriol, allegedly capable of receiving the lunar influence.
